title: What happens when agents get their own computers
summary: Cursor released new agent capabilities that automate code testing and produce video proof, and a cloud agent that manages pull requests to merge-ready state. Jonas Nelle demonstrates how agents can reduce human bottlenecks in the build-and-ship cycle by handling testing and PR management workflows.
